Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Leni and her friends start hanging out at Gus's in 'Grub Snub', then in 'She's All Bat', Lucy gets jealous of Lola's newfound attention after she joins the Mortician's Club.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lincoln seeks a better seat in class in 'Musical Chairs', then in 'The Taunting Hour', Lynn gets heckled at her soccer game, and the Louds realize they all have critics.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lincoln and Clyde overwater Howard's rare orchid in 'The Orchid Grief', and in 'Forks and Knives Out', Lynn Sr. is stoked to compete on a cooking show until he learns he's up against Rosa.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Vanzilla seems too broken down to ever drive again in 'Leave No Van Behind', then in 'Sponsor Tripped', Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Woods when their team gets sponsored.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Louds are invited to stay in a spooky castle in 'A Bite of Transylvania', then in 'Greece is the Word', during a tour of the Parthenon, Lincoln gets sent back to Ancient Greece.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Stella uses Principal Ramirez's pool in 'Swimming Fools', then in 'Stage Combat', Luna and Luan compete for a grant.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place in 'Toads and Tiaras', then in 'Two Boys and a Baby', Lincoln and Clyde take on babysitting.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lincoln's social standing is at stake when Lisa gets put into his 5th grade class in 'Making the Grade', then in 'Vantastic Voyage', the kids try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The family takes a reading challenge in 'Read Aloud', then in 'Not a Loud', Lincoln discovers that the first page of his baby book is blank, and worries his parents are hiding something.
